name: AeroVironment, Inc.
bullCase: AeroVironment expands market share in drone defense as autonomous systems become critical to modern military strategy.
bearCase: Defense spending cuts or increased competition in the UAS market could squeeze margins and slow revenue growth.
confidenceReason: Leading manufacturer of unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) and tactical missile systems for defense. Strong backlog due to global defense spending super-cycle, but heavily reliant on US government contracts. EPS growth modeled to be auto-derived from analyst consensus.
